summary: Module 2 testing complete. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI for Settings (4 tabs), Performance page, and EmployeeModal Teams multi-select all working correctly.

issues: Webhook URL not visible on the empty state page - it may only appear when an integration row exists. This is acceptable UX.

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted Frontend Test Team (team_bf996bd1) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module 2 all features passing. Backend: Teams CRUD, Notion Databases CRUD, Performance endpoint, Webhook, seed-v2, me/employee, system department protection - all working. Frontend: Sidebar (Employees/Performance/Settings only), Settings 4-tab page (Departments with System badges, no delete for system, Teams, Notion Integration), Performance page loads correctly, EmployeeModal Work Info tab shows Teams multi-select when teams exist.
tests_passed: Sidebar: Employees, Performance, Settings links present; NO Departments/Job Positions in nav
Settings 4 tabs: Departments, Job Positions, Teams, Notion Integration all present
Settings > Departments: 4 system departments with System badge, no delete buttons
Settings > Teams: Tab loads, Add Team button present, empty state shown
Settings > Notion Integration: Tab loads, Add Integration button present, empty state shown
Performance page: Loads without crash, shows 'No teams configured' with guidance
EmployeeModal Work Info tab: Team Assignment section with toggle buttons when teams exist
GET /api/departments: Returns departments with is_system field
GET /api/me/employee: Returns current user employee record
